reason: Legacy rotation profile is kept for comparison but is not suitable for observation.
Full-sample performance is good, but out-of-sample stability is not strong enough for recommendation.
Defensive profile can be useful in risk-off research, but it is not the main observation strategy.
Simple monthly equal-weight approach has shown better out-of-sample stability.
Fixed selected-basket equal-weight benchmark; useful as a stable baseline, not a dynamic rotation strategy.
Dynamic close-momentum rotation is the next main observation candidate after additional live validation.
